_comment: SCA exceptions — CVEs accepted as known risk with justification.

exceptions.reason: apollo-server v3 is EOL. This DoS affects startStandaloneServer() which is not used — we use the Express integration (apollo-server-express). Risk is low in this lab context. Real fix: migrate to @apollo/server v4.
exceptions.fix_ticket: TODO: migrate from apollo-server v3 to @apollo/server v4

exceptions.reason: XS-Search CSRF bypass. Requires a malicious page to make authenticated GraphQL requests via a logged-in browser session. Not applicable — this API uses Bearer token auth (Authorization header), which browsers never send cross-origin without explicit CORS approval. Not a session-cookie-based app.
exceptions.fix_ticket: TODO: migrate from apollo-server v3 to @apollo/server v4
